title: Peruvian Lace Front Wig - Kelly Wavy - Balayage - 12"
description:
MEET KELLY,Soft, sun-kissed, and effortlessly glam — our Peruvian Kelly Wavy Lace Front Wig is the perfect blend of bounce, movement, and natural beauty. The 12-inch length gives you that chic, everyday-ready look, while the balayage colour melt adds subtle dimension that brightens your features without doing the most.

Crafted from premium HC Peruvian hair, this wig is silky, lightweight, and made to last. The waves hold beautifully, giving you a fresh, salon-finish look with minimal effort.

Why You’ll Love It

  • Premium HC Peruvian Hair: Soft, silky, and long-lasting with natural movement.

  • 12" Chic Length: Perfect for everyday wear, workdays, or weekend glam.

  • Balayage Colour Melt: Seamless, multi-tonal highlights for a radiant finish.

  • Natural Wavy Texture: Juicy, effortless waves that keep their shape.

  • Lace Front Design: Creates a realistic hairline for easy styling and parting.

  • Low Maintenance: Holds its curl pattern with minimal styling needed.

Whether you're switching up your look or adding a natural pop of colour, Kelly Wavy is your go-to for soft, dimensional glam — every single day.

title: LAST UNIT AVAILABLE Peruvian HD 5x5 Lace Wig Water Wave 40 Inch
description:
Peruvian HD 5x5 Lace Wig – Water Wave (40”)

The definition of long hair luxury.
This 40-inch Peruvian HD 5x5 Lace Wig delivers a stunning cascade of juicy, soft water waves that move with every step. It’s the perfect mix of length, volume, and bounce. 💦

✨ Key Features:

  • 40 Inches of Drama: Extra-long length that turns heads everywhere you go.

  • Water Wave Texture: Juicy, defined curls with natural movement and shine.

  • HD 5x5 Lace: Invisible melt for a flawless, scalp-like finish.

  • Peruvian Human Hair: Silky-soft, full, and luxuriously lightweight.

  • Pre-Plucked & Can Be Glueless: Easy to wear straight out the box.

  • Style It Your Way: Go for the wet look, brush it out for volume, or define your waves — it always delivers.

💫 Why You’ll Love It:
Because nothing says main character energy like waist-length curls that look and feel this good.
Soft, juicy, and irresistibly glam — it’s the kind of hair that makes an entrance.

title: Peruvian 9x6 Pre Cut Pre Bleached Water Wave Lace Wig
description:
Soft waves, endless movement, and effortless glam — our Pre-Cut Peruvian 9x6 Pre-Bleached Water Wave Lace Wig is a must-have for those who love a natural, flowing texture. Crafted from our premium HC Peruvian hair, this wig features a wider 9x6 lace design for versatile styling and a flawless finish. Pre-bleached, pre-styled, and ready to wear, it’s your go-to for both everyday beauty and standout moments.

Key Features

  • Pre-Cut Lace - Our Lace is pre-cut for convenience and can be worn as a glueless wig

  • Made with our premium HC Peruvian hair – silky, soft & long-lasting

  • Water Wave texture – lightweight, bouncy & full of movement

  • 9x6 Lace Wig – extra lace space for natural parting & styling versatility

  • Pre-bleached knots, pre-styled & ready to wear – instant effortless glam

  • Adjustable straps & combs for a secure, glueless fit

    Model is wearing our 18"

title: Brazilian Lace Wig  5x5 Deep Curl Col 1B4 18 Inch
description:
Get ready to fall in love with volume, bounce, and natural movement. Our Brazilian 5x5 Deep Curl Lace Wig gives you that perfect curly texture that’s soft to the touch, full of life, and effortlessly beautiful.

The 1B/4 blend offers a rich mix of dark brown and soft chestnut tones — adding natural dimension and warmth that flatters every skin tone.

With a 5x5 lace closure, you’ll enjoy a natural-looking scalp and a realistic parting area that blends flawlessly, giving you the freedom to style your hair your way while keeping it secure and beginner-friendly.

Why You’ll Love It:
- Defined curls that stay soft and bouncy after every wash
- Glueless & READY TO WEAR — quick, easy, and comfortable fit
- 5x5 lace area for a natural-looking part and seamless blend
- Colour 1B/4 blend adds depth and dimension for a natural glow
- Made with premium Brazilian human hair – tangle-free & long-lasting

Product Details:

  • 100% HC Brazilian hair

  • 5x5 lace closure (free part)

  • Length: 18 inches

  • Texture: Deep Curl

  • Colour: 1B/4 blend

  • Pre-plucked hairline with baby hairs

  • Can be washed, styled, and revived with leave-in or curl cream

title: HD Peruvian 13x4 Lace Wig Velvet Curl 18 Inch
description:
Soft, luxurious, and irresistibly natural — our HD Peruvian 13x4 Lace Wig Velvet Curl 18” is designed to give you a flawless glam look with minimal effort. Made from our premium HC Peruvian hair, this wig features a rich velvet curl texture, an undetectable HD lace finish, and is pre-styled and ready to wear. Perfect for special occasions or elevating your everyday style.

Key Features

  • Made with our premium HC Peruvian hair – silky, soft & long-lasting

  • HD 13x4 Lace Frontal – seamless, invisible lace for a natural hairline. This HD lace is like no other!

  • Velvet Curl texture – full, defined curls with beautiful bounce

  • Pre-bleached knots, pre-styled & ready to wear – effortless glam in minutes

  • Adjustable straps & combs for a secure, glueless fit

title: Peruvian LUX 13x4 Lace Frontal Wig Water Wave colour 427
description:
Soft. Luxe. Undeniably Stunning.

Meet the wig that gives effortless luxury with zero effort. Our Peruvian LUX Water Wave in colour 427 blends rich golden-brown tones with natural dimension, creating a sun-kissed look that flatters every skin tone.

Made from our highest-grade Peruvian LUX hair, these waves are full, soft, and beautifully defined — giving you that fresh-from-the-salon glow every time you wear it.

The 13x4 lace frontal offers natural parting, a seamless melt, and versatile styling options whether you prefer a side part, middle part, or soft brushed-back look. The waves hold their shape beautifully while still staying lightweight and touchably soft.

Why You’ll Love It

  • Premium Peruvian LUX hair – our highest-quality grade

  • Natural Water Wave texture with gorgeous definition

  • Colour 427 – warm golden-brown blend with natural highlights

  • 13x4 Lace Frontal for effortless parting and a seamless hairline

  • Full, soft, and bouncy without tangling

  • Glueless-friendly with adjustable straps for a secure fit

  • Long-lasting quality with proper care (1+ years)

Perfect For

Women who want a statement look with premium softness, natural movement, and luxurious colour dimension.

A flawless everyday wig — elevated.

title: Peruvian LUX 13x4 Lace Frontal Wig Deep Wave
description:
Peruvian LUX 13x4 Lace Frontal Wig – Deep Wave (18”)

Turn heads with the unmatched beauty of Our Peruvian LUX Collection — our most premium Peruvian hair, designed for women who want luxury, longevity, and an effortlessly flawless look.

This 13x4 lace frontal gives you a natural, undetectable hairline with the freedom to part your hair in multiple ways, while the deep wave texture delivers rich, bouncy curls that hold their shape beautifully. Whether you wear it in its voluminous waves or brush it out for a softer, romantic look, this wig stays gorgeous with minimal effort.

Why You’ll Love It:

  • Premium HC Peruvian Hair: Sourced for its softness, strength, and natural luster, this is our highest quality Peruvian hair — silky, tangle-free, and built to last.

  • 13x4 Lace Frontal: Larger lace space for versatile styling — middle part, side part, or pulled back — all while keeping a seamless, natural finish.

  • 18 Inches of Luxury: The perfect length for a statement look that’s still easy to manage and style.

  • Deep Wave Texture: Full-bodied, springy curls that keep their bounce wash after wash.

  • Long-Lasting Investment: With proper care, this wig will stay beautiful wear after wear, making it a true value purchase. Can last you up to 2 years!

Yes — our wigs are glueless, ready-to-wear & pre-styled by our professional stylists

Perfect for both everyday wear and special occasions, this wig combines the freedom to style with the security of knowing your hair looks stunning from every angle.

title: LAGOS Hairline Peruvian 5x5 Wig Wavy Col Ombre 4 18 Inch
description:
LAGOS Hairline Peruvian 5x5 Wig Wavy Col Ombre 4 18 Inch

Our Lagos Hairline Collection is pre-plucked and shaped for a natural, signature finish. This 18-inch wavy unit in Ombre 4 (a rich brown gradient) is made with our premium HC Peruvian hair — silky, soft, and full of movement. The 5x5 lace closure features HD lace with ultra-fine knots for a seamless scalp illusion after installation.

Why choose our Lagos Hairline?

  • Pre-plucked & shaped for a natural trendy Lagos finish

  • HD lace + ultra-fine knots for a clean, realistic blend once installed

  • Premium HC Peruvian hair — soft, silky, and holds waves beautifully

  • Ombre 4 colour for a smooth, flattering brown transition

  • 5x5 lace closure for comfortable wear and versatile styling

  • Exclusive to HairCity
